source_path: 4. Contact360 Extension and Sales Navigator maturity/4.3.99 — Local extension sync smoke evidence.md
summary: Local execution evidence for extension sync surfaces (`EC2/extension.server`) in era `4.3`.

contract.text: Confirm and document strict request schema for `/v1/save-profiles`.
Ensure missing key and invalid JSON are differentiated with consistent error envelopes.

service.text: Add explicit auth-first validation path so no-key requests return stable auth error regardless of body shape.

surface.text: Keep extension popup error handling aligned with backend parse/auth responses.

data.text: Validate dedup + save-profiles path with a valid 5-profile payload in next smoke pass.

ops.text: Add automated smoke request fixtures for valid, empty, over-limit, and malformed payload variants.

sections.heading: Focus
sections.prose: Local execution evidence for extension sync surfaces (`EC2/extension.server`) in era `4.3`.
